summary: Matched more of the grcastle stage by adding its StageData/StageCallbacks data, implementing several formerly placeholder functions, tightening castle-specific ground/parameter structs, and fixing lb_80011A50 to return the lb_800100B0 result. The decomp.dev bot reported +572 matched code bytes and +8 data bytes, with new 100% matches for grCastle_801CD37C, grCastle_801CF7B0, grCastle_801D0D24, and grcastle .sbss; grCastle_801CD4D0 and grCastle_801CD8A8 also improved but were not fully matched.

key_files.role: Main grcastle matching work: added data tables, typed globals, includes, and implementations for grCastle_801CD37C, grCastle_801CD4D0, grCastle_801CD8A8, grCastle_801CF7B0, and grCastle_801D0D24.
Added grCastle_GroundVars spline storage at xE0 and a second castle ground-vars view holding HSD_GObj pointers and s16 state fields.
Replaced some placeholder prototypes with typed signatures, including grCastle_801CD4D0 returning HSD_GObj*, grCastle_801CE19C taking Ground_GObj*, and grCastle_801D0D84 taking f32.
Changed lb_80011A50 from void to returning struct lb_80011A50_t* by returning lb_800100B0(&x2C, arg2).
Updated the lb_80011A50 prototype to expose the returned struct lb_80011A50_t*.

what_changed.details: Added grCs_803E0FE8 S16Vec3 data, a 21-entry grCs_803E0FF4 StageCallbacks table, and grCs_803E11A4 StageData pointing at /GrCs.dat and the grcastle lifecycle callbacks.
Converted grCs_804D6970 from an untyped void pointer pattern into static grCastleParams*, added static u8 grCs_804D45E4 = 1, and added static struct lb_80011A50_t* grCs_804D6974.

Implemented grCastle_801CD37C: fetches params via Ground_801C49F8, sets stage_info.unk8C flags, creates gobj IDs 0, 4, 3, and 6, disables multiple mpLib collision entries with mpLib_80057BC0, calls Ground_801C39C0/Ground_801C3BB4, and stores the lb_80011A50 return pointer.
Implemented grCastle_801CD4D0 as a Ground_801C14D0 wrapper using StageCallbacks, GObj_SetupGXLink, optional callback0/callback2 setup, optional x1C_callback assignment, and an OSReport failure path.

Implemented grCastle_801CD8A8 enough for 86.15% according to decomp.dev: calls grCastle_801CF868, grCastle_801CE19C, Ground_801C2FE0, lb_800115F4, grCastle_801D0BBC, then iterates 12 HSD_Spline pointers to call grCastle_801D0D84 and grLib_801C9B8C/grCastle_801D0D24.
Replaced byte-offset loads in grCastle_801CDFD8 with grCastleParams field access for xA and x8.
Implemented grCastle_801CF7B0 to spawn gobj IDs 20, 19, and 18 into gp->gv.castle2, initialize xD0 to -1, and compute xD2 from grCs_804D6970->x0/x2 using HSD_Randi.
Implemented grCastle_801D0D24 to update grCs_804D6974->unk_scale from HSD_Randf, with different ranges depending on grCs_804D45E4.
Changed lb_80011A50 so callers can keep the allocated/registered lb_80011A50_t pointer returned by lb_800100B0.

smart_moves: Pulled the stage's callback/data layout into explicit StageCallbacks and StageData objects instead of leaving data unmatched; this directly improved grcastle .data to 85.38% per the bot report.
Used a local grCastleParams struct with offset-style x0/x2/x4/x8/xA/xC names, improving type safety while avoiding unsupported semantic guesses.
Fixed lb_80011A50 at the library boundary rather than faking a caller-side pointer; grCastle_801CD37C can now store the real struct lb_80011A50_t* and grCastle_801D0D24 can mutate unk_scale.
Added a separate grCastle_GroundVars2 union view for gobj-pointer state instead of overloading the existing grCastle_GroundVars fields with unsafe casts.
Preserved matching-sensitive details such as PAD_STACK(4), exact float constants, the OSReport string/line, and callback setup order in grCastle_801CD4D0.
decomp_lessons: Stage matches often require data-first work: reconstructing StageData plus the StageCallbacks table can unlock both code and .data progress.
When assembly shows a helper returning a pointer, correct the shared helper signature and header; do not leave a caller relying on an impossible void return.
For unknown param blobs, introduce a small xN-field struct when offsets are known, but defer semantic field names until behavior is understood.
Ground union variants are useful for stage code where different gobj callbacks interpret the same ground-variable region differently.
Header prototype cleanup should accompany function matching so future files can call the newly typed functions without UNK_PARAMS friction.
Spline arrays in stage ground vars may need explicit padding to the observed offset, as with HSD_Spline** xE0 after pad[0xE0 - 0xCC].
naming_conventions: Kept module-address names for functions: grCastle_801CD37C, grCastle_801CD4D0, grCastle_801CD8A8, grCastle_801CF7B0, grCastle_801D0D24.
Used grCs_ address globals for grcastle data and state: grCs_803E0FF4, grCs_803E11A4, grCs_804D45E4, grCs_804D6970, grCs_804D6974.
Used placeholder xN field names for newly inferred but semantically unknown structs: grCastleParams x0/x2/x4/x8/xA/xC and grCastle_GroundVars2 xC4/xC8/xCC/xD0/xD2.
Library helper type naming follows the existing address-based struct convention: struct lb_80011A50_t.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: grCastle_801CD37C uses PAD_STACK(4) before fetching params and again around the local Vec3 initializer, matching stack-shape requirements.
StageData bitfields were expressed as (1 << 1) and (1 << 0), matching the data table style shown in the diff.

grCastle_801CD4D0 preserves callback order: Ground_801C14D0, clear x8/xC callbacks, GObj_SetupGXLink, assign callback3 to x1C_callback, run callback0, then schedule callback2 with HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 priority 4.
The failure path in grCastle_801CD4D0 uses the exact OSReport payload from the diff: "%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n", "grcastle.c", 297.
grCastle_801CF7B0 uses a nested ternary and zero-range guards around HSD_Randi to reproduce the random selection between x0 and x2.
grCastle_801D0D24 keeps the float-expression shape visible in the diff: 0.3 * HSD_Randf() + 0.2 when the byte flag is nonzero, otherwise 0.05 * HSD_Randf().
grCastle_801CDFD8 retained matching-oriented local/register structure while replacing raw offset loads with grCastleParams fields.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported matched code 55.50% (+0.01%, +572 bytes) and matched data 34.71% (+0.00%, +8 bytes). New 100% matches: grCastle_801CD37C (+292), grCastle_801CF7B0 (+184), grCastle_801D0D24 (+96), and grcastle .sbss. Improvements: .data to 85.38%, grCastle_801CD4D0 to 99.95%, grCastle_801CD8A8 to 86.15%, .sdata2 to 39.86%, and .sdata to 9.09%.
No human review comments or reviewer-requested naming changes were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Investigate the remaining 0.05% mismatch in grCastle_801CD4D0; decomp.dev reported 99.95%, not 100%.
Continue grCastle_801CD8A8 matching from 86.15%, especially loop structure over gp->gv.castle.xE0 and calls to grCastle_801D0D84/grLib_801C9B8C/grCastle_801D0D24.
Resolve semantic names for grCastleParams fields x0, x2, x8, and xA once more callsites or data definitions are understood.
Search for other lb_80011A50 callers that can now use the returned struct lb_80011A50_t* after the signature fix.
Compare other stage modules' StageData and StageCallbacks tables for reusable grCastle_801CD4D0-style gobj setup patterns.
